en.extract:
The green crombec (Sylvietta virens) is a species of African warbler, formerly placed in the family Sylviidae.
It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland.

The '''green crombec''' ('''''Sylvietta virens''''') is a species of [[African warbler]], formerly placed in the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Sylviidae]].
It is widespread across the [[Tropical forest|African tropical rainforest]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[shrubland]].
